buyingProcess.q: How do I buy a property?
buyingProcess.a: First, get pre-approved for a mortgage. Then contact me to view properties that match your budget. I’ll guide you through the entire process — from offer to closing.

documents.a: You’ll need a valid ID, proof of income (pay stubs, tax returns), bank statements, and a pre-approval letter from a lender.

downPayment.q: How much down payment is required?
downPayment.a: It varies: conventional loans typically require 5-20% down, FHA loans as low as 3.5%, and VA loans may require 0%.

closingCosts.a: Closing costs are typically 2-5% of the purchase price and include appraisal, inspection, title insurance, and lender fees.

timeline.q: How long does the buying process take?
timeline.a: From offer to closing usually takes 30-45 days, depending on financing and inspections.

badCredit.q: Can I rent with bad credit?
badCredit.a: Yes, some landlords accept tenants with less-than-perfect credit, especially with a larger security deposit or co-signer.

available.a: I have a wide range of properties — houses, apartments, condos, and villas. Use the search filters above to find exactly what you need!

selling.q: Do you help with selling too?
selling.a: Absolutely! I provide market analysis, professional photography, listing management, and negotiation services to get you the best price.

areas.a: I cover all major areas. Check the listings to see available properties in your preferred location.

descriptions.house: This stunning home features an open floor plan with abundant natural light, modern finishes throughout, and a spacious backyard perfect for entertaining.
descriptions.apartment: This stylish apartment offers contemporary living in the heart of the city. Features include hardwood floors, in-unit laundry, and a private balcony with skyline views.
descriptions.condo: This beautifully maintained condo offers resort-style living with top-of-the-line amenities. Enjoy the community pool, gym, and 24-hour concierge service.
descriptions.villa: Experience luxury living in this exquisite villa featuring Mediterranean architecture, private pool, landscaped gardens, and premium finishes throughout.
descriptions.default: This beautiful property offers modern finishes and an open floor plan.
